title: Copper Items Resource
body:
# **Summary**
Adds textures for my plugin https://modrinth.com/plugin/copper-items, for armour model is Optifine or CIT resewn required.
This texture pack adds textures for:

 - Copper Sword
 - Copper Axe
 - Copper Pickaxe
 - Copper Shovel
 - Copper Hoe
 - Copper Boots (item)
 - Copper Chestplate (item)
 - Copper Leggings (item)
 - Copper Helmet (item)
 - Copper layer 1 (helmet, chestplate and boots texture)
 - Copper layer 2 (leggings)

Textures are based on CustomModelData (items) or CIT (armour). CustomModelData is "1" in all cases.
